picks.quote: it's a very winnable fight for Masadol... I do believe that with a good training camp... that he could really beat a guy like Kobe Coington.
if I had to pick one of these guys... of course I got to go with one right here, Conor McGregor.
I do believe that if Masod does not get Conor McGregor, the best the next logical fight for him is against Vicente Luc.
